entity.summary: Non-custodial onchain perpetual instruments exchange on Arbitrum offering leveraged exposure to stocks, ETFs, commodities, indices, foreign exchange, and crypto with USDC settlement.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Ostium as an onchain perpetual instruments platform on Arbitrum with self-custodied collateral, onchain position settlement, real-world and crypto markets, request-for-quote execution, and direct smart-contract access. Current independently maintained metrics report substantial non-zero perpetual volume, fees, revenue, TVL, and open interest. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: How Ostium Works
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Ostium as a non-custodial onchain perpetual instruments platform on Arbitrum offering leveraged markets across stocks, ETFs, commodities, indices, forex, and crypto with USDC settlement.

evidence.title: Ostium protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current protocol metrics report non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day perpetual volume together with TVL, fees, revenue, and open interest, supporting active classification.
